title: artanthe lhotzkyana
intro: Artanthe lhotzkyana, also known as the "Yellow Passion Flower," is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Artanthe lhotzkyana include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Artanthe lhotzkyana, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, are commonly used in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
